major_differences.parameter: Time Setpoint Not Met During Occupied Heating
major_differences.interpretation: The modified simulation shows an increase in the hours during which the heating setpoint was not met, indicating potential issues with heating performance.

major_differences.parameter: Time Not Comfortable Based on Simple ASHRAE 55-2004
major_differences.interpretation: The modified simulation shows a decrease in the hours not meeting comfort criteria, suggesting improved thermal comfort despite the increase in heating setpoint not met time.

summary.overall_trend: The modifications have led to a slight improvement in thermal comfort while increasing the time setpoint not met during heating, indicating a trade-off between heating performance and comfort.
